name: Vernusylph Corolla
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>春</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>け</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>冠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かんむり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: All EARTH monsters you control are also treated as "Vernusylph" monsters. Once per turn, if you would discard a "Vernusylph" monster(s) and 1 card to activate the effect of that "Vernusylph" monster in your hand, you can discard only that "Vernusylph" monster(s) instead.
eff: All EARTH monsters you control are also treated as "Vernusylph" monsters. Once per turn, if you would discard a "Vernusylph" monster(s) and 1 card to activate the effect of that "Vernusylph" monster in your hand, you can discard only that "Vernusylph" monster(s) instead.
